changes: Phalanx: Reduced damage taken has been changed from 50% to 33%.
Blota: Heavy effect duration has been reduced from 5 to 3 seconds.
Phantom Rush: Potency has been increased from 10,000 to 12,000.
Sky Shatter: Potency has been reduced from 20,000 to 18,000.
Sky Shatter: Potency increase when targets are within 5 yalms has been changed from 30,000 to 32,000.
Sky Shatter: Barrier strength has been changed from absorbing damage totaling 25% of maximum HP to absorbing damage equivalent to a heal of 24,000 potency.
Fuma Shuriken: Range has been reduced from 25 to 20 yalms.
Hyosho Ranryu: Range has been reduced from 25 to 20 yalms.
Goka Mekkyaku: Range has been reduced from 25 to 20 yalms.
Plentiful Harvest: Maximum potency has been increased from 20,000 to 24,000.
Curing Waltz: Healing potency has been increased from 8,000 to 10,000.
Burst: Barrier strength has been increased from 12,000 to 16,000.
Magick Barrier: Effect duration has been increased from 8 to 10 seconds.
Frazzle: Effect duration has been increased from 8 to 10 seconds.
Southern Cross: Healing potency has been increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
Southern Cross: Damage potency has been increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
Southern Cross: Cure potency increase from White Shift has been reduced from 100% to 50%.
Southern Cross: Damage potency increase from Black Shift has been reduced from 100% to 50%.
Adloquium: Cure potency has been reduced from 4,000 to 3,000.
Adloquium: Barrier strength has been increased from 4,000 to 6,000.
Fall Malefic: The recast time reduction granted by the additional effect 'Reduces the recast time of Double Cast' has been changed from 7.5 to 10 seconds.

new_content.name: Pandæmonium: Abyssos
new_content.description: Raid tier; weekly restrictions on entrance and rewards removed; treasure coffers now always appear.

new_content.name: Abyssos: The Eighth Circle
new_content.description: Raid floor; weekly restriction on receiving Unsung Blades of Abyssos removed.

new_content.name: Crystalline Conflict
new_content.description: PvP system; season transition; match mechanics and music track adjustments.

new_content.name: Eureka Orthos
new_content.description: Deep dungeon; fixed issues regarding enemy attack timing and aetherpool gear stats.

new_content.name: Island Sanctuary
new_content.description: System feature; resolved issue regarding animal naming.

new_content.name: Splendorous Tools
new_content.description: System feature; resolved display issue with item helptext for third-tier tools.

new_content.name: Instance Consolidation
new_content.description: System feature; Mor Dhona, Radz-at-Han, Thavnair, and Mare Lamentorum no longer use multiple instances.

new_content.name: Gear Augmentation
new_content.description: Major feature; exchange of coins for Moonshine Brine to upgrade tomestone gear.

housing.name: Valentione Rose Heels
housing.description: Feet gear item mentioned in Resolved Issues (graphics display issue for male Lalafells).

glamour.name: Valentione Rose Heels
glamour.description: Feet gear for which an issue with graphics displaying incorrectly on male Lalafells was resolved.
